title: Breakwave Tanker Report 5.20.2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 20/05/2025
Stability Brings Optimism - The VLCC market has shown signs of stabilization, particularly on Eastern routes. Middle East to Asia and WAF
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2025-05-20_BreakwaveTankersMay202025Report.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/shipbuilding/pdfs/2025-05-20_BreakwaveTankersMay202025Report.pdf

[Page 1]
Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
May 20, 2025
• Stability Brings Optimism - The VLCC market has shown signs of stabilization, Short-term Indicators
particularly on Eastern routes. Middle East to Asia and WAF to Asia trades are
Momentum: Positive
gradually firming, supported by a combination of increased inquiry, a tightening
Sentiment: Positive
tonnage list, and the ongoing uplift in OPEC output.
